data.name: My Futanari Stepmom Impregnated Me
data.detailed_description:
Futa on Female

As a 21 year old girl who has recently realized that she has feelings for her stepmom, life is complicated...

She's your stepmom and married to your father after all, yet your feelings towards her are getting harder to suppress by the day.

After a tough day, your stepmom is there to console you, and things soon turn awkward... in a very sexy way. 😏

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

  • Kinetic Visual Novel
  • H-Scenes
  • ~4K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
